responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX project media mixing (Perez showing Casa Rosario photos), restore landing reels, create one canonical project data source ‚Äî AND eliminate all fake deployment narratives by enforcing an evidence-first 12-state deployment state machine with 18 required evidence fields, plus repair the orchestrator so completed tasks must actually reach production.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/` (also `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`)
- Public landing live at `https://ivxholding.com` (S3 bucket, deployed via `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` using AWS credentials)
- Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence; no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- **Mandatory deployment state machine (owner spec 2026-07-11)**: REPO_FROZEN‚ÜíCODE_CHANGED‚ÜíFILES_MODIFIED‚ÜíLOCAL_BUILD‚ÜíTESTS_PASSED‚ÜíCOMMIT_CREATED‚ÜíPUSH_COMPLETED‚ÜíDEPLOY_STARTED‚ÜíDEPLOY_IN_PROGRESS‚ÜíDEPLOY_COMPLETED‚ÜíHEALTH_CHECK_OK‚ÜíPRODUCTION_VERIFIED ‚Äî no state may be skipped
- **Prohibited narrative phrases** (blocked unless backed by real evidence): "Deployment successful", "Build completed", "Changes applied", "Production updated", "Health check passed", "Live on Render", "Successfully deployed", "Fix complete"
- **Forbidden evidence values**: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED ‚Äî any field containing these ‚Üí FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED
- **18 required evidence fields**: repository, branch, commitSha, previousCommitSha, filesChanged, linesAdded, linesRemoved, pushStatus, deploymentPlatform, deploymentId, deploymentStatus, deploymentTimestamp, productionUrl, healthEndpoint, httpStatus, runningCommitSha, runtimeVersion, verificationTime + qaResult
- **Six-point completion checklist (owner spec 2026-07-11)**: git commit exists, push completed, deployment started, deployment completed, health endpoint HTTP 200, production running latest commit ‚Äî ANY unmet ‚Üí NOT_DEPLOYED
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key ‚Äî only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift ‚Äî cannot preview React Native app from sandbox
- User demands real production evidence; any missing proof must be marked UNVERIFIED

## Progress
### Done
- **IVX IA gate fix ‚Äî code complete, locally verified (NOT deployed)**:
  - Gate test suite: 23/23 PASS; backend test suite previously 812/812 PASS; TypeScript: 0 backend errors
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` ‚Äî gate: blocks placeholders unconditionally, blocks DEPLOYED/LIVE/VERIFIED claims without evidence
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` ‚Äî gate wired at line 567 in `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` (all 26 answer paths)
  - `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` ‚Äî placeholder rejection added
  - `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` ‚Äî 8 forbidden markers added + 7 new deployment narrative markers (Deployment successful, Successfully deployed, Build completed, Production updated, Live on Render, Fix complete, forbidden evidence value regex)
- **Prior production state**: commit `d35db8b99cf4370e98e13564a8b8563ff43e458a` live on Render (HTTP 200, `/version` confirmed); gate fix NOT deployed
- **Phase 1 audit COMPLETE ‚Äî root cause identified**:
  - `jv_deals` table uses TEXT ids: `perez-residence-001`, `casa-rosario-001`, `JV-202603-5190`
  - `project_media` table uses UUID `project_id` ‚Äî ALL 14 rows are orphans; none reference real jv_deals
  - `project_videos` table: all 17 rows orphaned, all `is_approved=false`
  - No `jv_deal_media` or `jv_deal_reels` tables exist yet (jv_deal_reels returns HTTP 404)
  - Frontend compensated with hardcoded fallback arrays where `PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS` contained Casa Rosario's R2 URLs
  - Landing page had 4 duplicate copies of fallback arrays
  - Hardcoded `ownership_text` values in landing didn't match dynamic calculation from app
  - Perez `propertyValue` was 2500000 in landing but `estimated_value` is 3125000 in DB
  - Casa Rosario had `display_order=1` (same as Perez) ‚Äî duplicate
  - IVX Jacksonville had embedded base64 data-URI photo in `photos` JSONB
- **Phase 2-6 code changes MADE and LOCALLY VERIFIED**:
  - `expo/constants/deal-photos.ts` ‚Äî PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS replaced with 8 correct Supabase storage URLs from `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/` folder
  - `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` ‚Äî all 4 fallback arrays replaced; localStorage cache integrity guard added; hardcoded ownership_text removed; Perez sale_price corrected to 3125000; NEW reels section added (fetches jv_deal_reels, falls back to project_videos approved-only, dedupes, empty state, per-item error isolation)
  - `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` ‚Äî NEW migration: creates `jv_deal_media` + `jv_deal_reels` tables with FK to `jv_deals(id)`, data corrections, `ivx_project_integrity` view; updated with Casa Rosario tour reel seed (video/thumb/poster all verified HTTP 200)
- **Phase 7 integrity tests COMPLETE ‚Äî 9/9 PASS, 43 assertions**:
  - `expo/__tests__/deal-photo-integrity.test.ts` ‚Äî Perez/Casa disjointness, cross-mapping blocked, fallback lookup safety, 0.0016% ownership parity, clamping
- **Phase 8 audit + QA COMPLETE (local)**:
  - `expo/scripts/project-integrity-audit.mjs` ‚Äî ran against production: 3 projects, 0 duplicate slugs, 14/14 orphan media, 17/17 orphan videos, Casa Rosario 0 valid photos (FAIL), duplicate display_order 1/1, Jacksonville 1 data-URI photo, jv_deal_reels 404
  - Full test suite: **311/311 pass** (1 pre-existing playwright e2e loader error excluded); `tsc --noEmit`: **0 errors**
  - Production URLs verified: casa tour video HTTP 200, casa thumb HTTP 200, casa poster HTTP 200, perez photo-0 HTTP 200, casa r2 photo HTTP 200
  - Backend `/version` confirmed: commit `d35db8b9`, bootTime `2026-07-10T19:19:23.089Z`
- **Deployment state machine ‚Äî code complete, tests pass, typecheck passes**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.ts` ‚Äî 12-state machine (`DEPLOYMENT_STATES`), `advanceDeploymentState()` (no-skip enforcement), `FORBIDDEN_EVIDENCE_VALUES` (13 values), `isForbiddenEvidenceValue()`, `DeploymentEvidenceReport` type (18 fields + qaResult), `validateDeploymentEvidence()` (returns VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED with missingFields/forbiddenValues/failures), `formatDeploymentReport()` (Step 9 final report, missing=UNVERIFIED), `isRealCommitSha()` (7-40 hex), `commitShasMatch()` (prefix equality)
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.test.ts` ‚Äî 96/96 PASS (269 assertions); tests: 12 states in order, no skip, no backwards, 10 forbidden values, missing fields‚ÜíUNVERIFIED, HTTP non-200‚ÜíUNVERIFIED, commit mismatch‚ÜíUNVERIFIED, QA FAIL/null‚ÜíUNVERIFIED, fake SHA rejection, report rendering with UNVERIFIED slots
  - Typecheck on all 3 changed/new modules: `tsc --noEmit --strict` ‚Üí exit 0
- **Task orchestrator repair ‚Äî code changes MADE (NOT yet tested/run)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-completion-gate.ts` ‚Äî NEW: `BlockCompletionEvidence` type, `NO_DEPLOYMENT_EVIDENCE` constant, `resolveBlockCompletionStatus()` ‚Äî applies six-point checklist, returns VERIFIED or NOT_DEPLOYED with exact failure list; pure + deterministic (no I/O)
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-state-store.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: added `'not_deployed'` to `IVXTaskStatus`, added `'NOT_DEPLOYED'` to `IVXTaskBlockStatus`, added `SETTLED_BLOCK_STATUSES` (includes NOT_DEPLOYED), `findResumeBlock` and roll-up recompute use SETTLED, `tasksRoot()` now overrideable via `IVX_TASKS_ROOT` env var (for test isolation)
  - `backend/services/ivx-task-orchestrator.ts` ‚Äî UPDATED: imports `resolveBlockCompletionStatus` + `BlockCompletionEvidence`; block status now driven by six-point checklist (commit+push+deploy+health+runningCommit) instead of just `proof.ok`; `finalizeTaskStatus` requires ALL blocks VERIFIED for task `completed`, otherwise `not_deployed`; `isTerminalTaskStatus` includes `not_deployed`; summary includes `notDeployedBlocks` count; `deploymentStatus` field set to `deployed_verified` or `NOT_DEPLOYED`
- **Task audit COMPLETE ‚Äî root cause of orchestrator bug identified**:
  - 60 task dirs in `logs/audit/task-orchestrator`; 45 marked `completed`, 15 `blocked`
  - Of 45 completed: 0 have deployed blocks, 0 have real commits; many have `commitHash='abc1234'` (fake)
  - Root cause: orchestrator mapped `proof.ok` directly to COMPLETED/VERIFIED without checking if production was actually running the commit; `gitDeployOperator.status='ready_owner_approval_required'` (no credentials) still counted as ok
  - No hardcoded "Deployment Successful"/"Build Successful" etc. strings found in backend .ts files (only in claim gate for detection purposes)

### In Progress
- **Task orchestrator repair ‚Äî needs test run**: changes made to `ivx-task-orchestrator.ts`, `ivx-task-state-store.ts`, and new `ivx-task-completion-gate.ts` but NOT yet tested or typechecked; existing test `ivx-task-orchestrator.test.ts` uses `commitHash: 'abc1234'` and expects `status: 'completed'` ‚Äî will likely FAIL now since completion gate requires real SHA + deployment evidence
- **Phase 2-3: SQL migration needs to be applied** ‚Äî `ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` written but NOT executed (requires Supabase service-role key; anon key can't create tables or update rows due to RLS)

### Blocked
- **GitHub push blocked ‚Äî NO valid token**: sandbox `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var is empty (len:0 confirmed); Worker's stored token (`ghp_****QTOt`) is revoked (401 Bad credentials); user has not authorized any device code; `GITHUB_REPO` env also empty
- **Render API key empty**: sandbox `RENDER_API_KEY` env var is empty (len:0 confirmed) ‚Äî cannot trigger or verify deploys
- **Supabase schema changes blocked** ‚Äî anon key cannot create tables or update rows (RLS); need service-role key or Supabase dashboard SQL editor access
- **Landing deploy blocked** ‚Äî `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` requires `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` + `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` env vars; not present in sandbox
- **Cannot run Expo Go on Android from sandbox** ‚Äî no Android emulator/device
- **Render API key exposed in prior chat**: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` should be rotated

## Key Decisions
- localtunnel permanently retired ‚Äî replaced with Expo official `--tunnel`
- `IvxBufferLike` extends `Uint8Array` to satisfy `crypto.createHash().update()` type constraint
- `tsconfig.json` excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**`
- Shared-store fix: single `ChatStorage` instance (`publicChatStorage`) from `backend/hono.ts` passed to `attachChatRealtime`
- Deployment claim gate at `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` line 567 ‚Äî universal choke point for all 26 answer paths
- Gate marker labels prefixed with "fabricated" to avoid self-leakage
- **Media mixing root cause**: `jv_deals` uses TEXT ids but `project_media`/`project_videos` use UUID `project_id` ‚Äî no FK relationship possible; all media/video rows are orphans; frontends used hardcoded title-matched fallback arrays where Perez got Casa Rosario's URLs
- **Perez photos corrected** to 8 Supabase storage URLs under `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/`
- **Ownership values**: hardcoded `ownership_text` removed from landing; both app and landing now use dynamic `(minInvestment / salePrice) * 100` calculation; Perez `sale_price` corrected to 3125000 ‚Üí 0.0016% everywhere
- **Reels architecture**: new `jv_deal_reels` table (FK to `jv_deals.id`) as canonical source; landing JS fetches it first, falls back to `project_videos` (approved only)
- **Canonical schema**: `jv_deal_media` table with `project_id TEXT FK‚Üíjv_deals(id)`, `is_cover`, `is_shared`, `sort_order`, `published`; unique index on `public_url` for non-shared media
- **Deployment state machine is pure + deterministic** (no I/O, network, or AI) ‚Äî fully unit-testable; `validateDeploymentEvidence()` checks all 18 fields, forbidden values, HTTP 200, commit SHA match, push status, deployment status, and QA result
- **Orchestrator root cause**: `proof.ok` was mapped directly to COMPLETED/VERIFIED even when `gitDeployOperator.status='ready_owner_approval_required'` (no credentials) ‚Äî no real commit, push, deploy, or health check happened; fix: six-point completion gate now required, `finalizeTaskStatus` only returns `completed` when ALL blocks are VERIFIED
- **Task completion gate is pure + deterministic** ‚Äî `resolveBlockCompletionStatus()` takes evidence object, returns VERIFIED or NOT_DEPLOYED with exact failure list; no I/O, no network, no AI; can never fabricate evidence
- **`SETTLED_BLOCK_STATUSES`** includes NOT_DEPLOYED so resume logic skips blocks that finished code work but didn't deploy (prevents infinite re-run loops)

## Next Steps
- Run `bun test backend/services/ivx-task-orchestrator.test.ts` to verify orchestrator changes don't break existing tests; update test expectations if needed (tests using `abc1234` + expecting `completed` will now get `not_deployed`)
- Typecheck all changed orchestrator files
- Run full backend test suite to confirm no regressions
- Once tests pass: commit all orchestrator + gate + state machine changes locally
- Provide valid `GITHUB_TOKEN` (repo scope) and `RENDER_API_KEY` to unblock push/deploy/verify cycle
- Apply `ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` to Supabase (needs service-role key)
- Deploy landing to S3 (needs AWS credentials)

## Critical Context
- Both `GITHUB_TOKEN` and `RENDER_API_KEY` env vars confirmed empty (len:0) in sandbox ‚Äî no push or deploy possible until user provides credentials
- Existing test `ivx-task-orchestrator.test.ts` line 24 uses `
